scripts.install:all: concurrently "cd backend && npm install" "cd frontend && npm install" "cd blockchain && npm install"
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npm run dev
scripts.setup:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.setup:blockchain: cd blockchain && npm install && npx hardhat compile
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run setup:backend" "npm run setup:frontend" "npm run setup:blockchain"
